scripts.check-types: pnpm run build:generated && pnpm run check-types:src && pnpm run check-types:isolate-runtime
scripts.build:generated: pnpm run build:polyfills && pnpm run build:isolate-runtime
scripts.build: pnpm run build:bridge && pnpm run build:generated && tsc
scripts.test:test-suite: pnpm run build:generated && vitest run tests/test-suite.test.ts tests/test-suite-python.test.ts
scripts.test:runtime-driver: pnpm run build:generated && vitest run tests/runtime-driver/*.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:node: pnpm run test:test-suite && pnpm run test:runtime-driver
scripts.test:integration:browser: pnpm run build:generated && vitest run --config vitest.browser.config.ts tests/test-suite/node.test.ts tests/runtime-driver/browser/runtime.test.ts
scripts.test:project-matrix: pnpm run build:generated && vitest run tests/project-matrix.test.ts
